properties.title: New items not showing in tabs
properties.description: Database persistence is mocked in LLMBrainDumpProcessor.createDatabaseEntry() - items aren't actually saved
properties.root_cause: createDatabaseEntry() only logs 'would create' instead of persisting

properties.title: Parking lot archiving
properties.description: Completed/archived/deleted tasks from parking lot should move to ARCHIVE tab

properties.title: Soft delete with retention
properties.description: Deleted tasks stay in archive for 24 hours before permanent deletion

properties.title: Clear All resources
properties.description: Add deleting all resources to Clear All button in Calendar tab

properties.title: EACCES Permission Issue Resolution
properties.description: Resolved recurring permission denied errors when editing LifeManager source files
properties.root_cause: Mixed file ownership between 'Work' and 'anmolmanchanda' users, with 91% of files owned by 'Work'
properties.solution: File ownership automatically changed to current user, enabling direct source file editing
properties.impact: Can now apply fixes directly to source files instead of creating separate _FIXED files

properties.root_cause: MainViewModel automatically executes monitor_logs.sh shell script on startup
properties.solution: Remove or conditionally compile automatic log monitoring
properties.impact: Eliminates system password dialogs on app launch

properties.root_cause: Logger service creates log files in ~/Documents/LifeManager/Logs/
properties.solution: Move log files to Application Support directory

properties.root_cause: AuthenticationView contains extensive development testing controls
